message:
fix(engine): update tests for deterministic builder sorting and SHA-256 hash length

Align test expectations with recent engine changes:

- evidence_ledger: tests now expect sorted witnesses by witness_id
  and sorted candidates by action_name, matching the builder's
  deterministic ordering (previously expected insertion order)
- deterministic_replay: tests expect 64-char SHA-256 hex hashes
  instead of 16-char u64, reflecting compute_simple_hash upgrade
- versioned_rewrite_pack: rewrite catalog hash framing test to
  use clearer pack/catalog ID examples ("ab"+"pack" vs "a"+"bpack")
  that better demonstrate length-prefix collision prevention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
